season.name: 2026 World Cup Qualifying - Concacaf, Second Round

keyEvents.text: First Half begins.
Goal!  Guatemala 1, Dominica 0. Alejandro Galindo (Guatemala) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the centre of the goal.
Chad Bertrand (Dominica) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal!  Guatemala 2, Dominica 0. Allen Yanes (Guatemala) header from the centre of the box to the centre of the goal. Assisted by Óscar Santis with a cross.
Allen Yanes (Guatemala) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Travis Joseph (Dominica) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
First Half ends, Guatemala 2, Dominica 0.
Second Half begins Guatemala 2, Dominica 0.
Goal!  Guatemala 3, Dominica 0. Alejandro Galindo (Guatemala) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the high centre of the goal.
Goal!  Guatemala 4, Dominica 0. Rubio Rubín (Guatemala) header from the centre of the box to the centre of the goal. Assisted by José Morales with a cross.
Substitution, Dominica. Audel Laville replaces Javid George.
Substitution, Guatemala. Carlos Mejía replaces Nathaniel Méndez-Laing.
Substitution, Guatemala. Marco Dominguez-Ramirez replaces Óscar Castellanos.
Substitution, Dominica. Reon Cuffy replaces Julian Wade.
Substitution, Dominica. Triston Sandy replaces Chad Bertrand.
Substitution, Guatemala. Pedro Altán replaces Alejandro Galindo.
Substitution, Guatemala. Olger Escobar replaces Óscar Santis.
Substitution, Dominica. Keeyan Thomas replaces Briel Thomas because of an injury.
Substitution, Guatemala. José Martínez replaces Rubio Rubín.
Goal!  Guatemala 5, Dominica 0. José Martínez (Guatemala) header from the centre of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Olger Escobar with a cross   following a corner.
Goal!  Guatemala 6, Dominica 0. José Morales (Guatemala) right footed shot from outside the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Carlos Mejía   following a corner.
Second Half ends, Guatemala 6, Dominica 0.
